title: Spicy Thai Rice Bowl
description: A flavorful and spicy Thai-inspired rice bowl dish with juicy chicken, crunchy vegetables and a tangy sauce.
instructions: Cook the Thai jasmine rice according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-6 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the spicy Thai red curry paste to the skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the coconut milk to the skillet and bring to a simmer.
Add the sliced carrots and bell peppers to the skillet and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Stir in the cooked chicken, salt, and pepper.
Serve the chicken and vegetable mixture over the cooked Thai jasmine rice.
